CustomField.label: Date of Birth
CustomField.description: Patient date of birth — Annexure C1.1 core person attribute (design §2.3, OQ-026). One of the three inputs (with full name + mobile) normalized into VS_Match_Key__c for exact-match de-dup (D-011/D-017); also the basis for future age/next-dose-due math (deferred feature — no next-dose logic built in this ticket). Required because the match key cannot be computed without it.
